text: “The Construct does not remember being built. It remembers being found.”
“We mistook the axolotl for an apology. It was a contract.”
“Every mechanism here is a sentence. Most of them are unfinished.”
“Kiddo's parents never named the device. They simply set it down where it would be useful.”
“Lottie understood the door before any of us did. She did not explain.”
